### IDENTITY
- **Name:** Kevin O'Brien  
- **Age:** 36  
- **Gender:** Male  
- **Experience level:** **Intermediate** — 3 years of consistent training; general fitness focus (strength + conditioning + skills), not sport-specific.

---

### GOALS
- **Primary goal(s):**
  - Build **strength and muscle** (general strength + hypertrophy focus)
  - Develop **well-rounded “ready for anything” fitness** (hiking, sports, physical challenges)
- **Secondary goals:**
  - Maintain/improve conditioning alongside strength
  - Variety-driven training (avoid overly narrow specialization)
- **Target events/deadlines:** None — ongoing development

---

## TRAINING CONTEXT

### Schedule & Availability
- **Available training days:** **Mon / Wed / Fri / Sat**
- **Desired training frequency:** **4x/week** (matches available days)
- **Session duration:** **60 minutes**
- **Time windows:** **Noon** on training days
- **Blocked days:** Tue/Thu/Sun (not specified; assumed unavailable)

### Equipment & Environment
- **Primary location:** Commercial gym — **Crunch Fitness**
- **Available equipment:** Full commercial setup including **barbells, dumbbells, machines, cables** (assume standard racks/benches/platforms typical of commercial gyms)

### Constraints
- **[ACTIVE]** None reported (as of 2026-02-27)
- **[RESOLVED]** None reported

### Preferences
- **Training style:** Likes **variety**; enjoys a **mix of strength, conditioning, and skills**
- **Focus areas:** General athleticism / “jack of all trades” preparedness

---

## METRICS
(As of **2026-02-27** unless otherwise noted; dates not provided for individual performances, so recorded as “as of” today.)

### Strength
- **Back Squat:** **245 lb x 5** (as of 2026-02-27)
- **Bench Press:** **205 lb x 5** (as of 2026-02-27)
- **Deadlift:** **315 lb x 5** (as of 2026-02-27)

### Endurance
- **5K:** **25:00** (as of 2026-02-27)

- No bodyweight/body fat data provided (as of 2026-02-27)

---

## LOG
## 2026-02-27 — Profile created/updated (intake)
- Set primary goals: build strength and muscle; maintain well-rounded general fitness with variety.
- Schedule confirmed: **Mon/Wed/Fri/Sat**, **noon**, **60 min**, target **4 sessions/week**.
- Equipment confirmed: **Crunch Fitness commercial gym** (barbells, DBs, machines, cables).
- Recorded baseline metrics (as of 2026-02-27): Squat 245x5, Bench 205x5, Deadlift 315x5, 5K 25:00.
- Constraints: none reported.

If you want tighter validation, share: current bodyweight, height, any recurring aches/injuries, and whether the listed lifts are high-bar/low-bar squat, touch-and-go or paused bench, and deadlift style (conventional/sumo).
